phase_inventory.expected_acceptance_summary: Review Memory contract, DB store, same-origin routes, UI binding, and foundation lifecycle read-only UI without treating review records as durable Perspective state.

phase_inventory.next_action: No immediate Phase 2 implementation slice recommended.

phase_inventory.next_action: Do not implement final RAG answer generation without a separate explicit provider/retrieval/RAG approval boundary.
